publication_title: Biopsy and blood-based molecular biomarker of inflammation in IBD

study_name: GSE235236; macrophage and neutrophil heterogeneity in IBD
publication_title: Macrophage and neutrophil heterogeneity at single-cell spatial resolution in human inflammatory bowel disease
verification_notes: Verified GEO record, publication, DOI, PMID, sample count, RNA-seq platform, and public raw/processed availability. Age group not directly supported.

study_name: GSE57945; pediatric Crohn ileal transcriptome and microbiome
publication_title: Pediatric Crohn disease patients exhibit specific ileal transcriptome and microbiome signature

study_name: GSE10616; pediatric-onset IBD colon biopsy expression
publication_title: Loci on 20q13 and 21q22 are associated with pediatric-onset inflammatory bowel disease
verification_notes: Verified GEO record, publication, DOI, PMID, platform, and public raw/processed availability. Subject count remains unclear because samples include internal controls.

study_name: GSE126124; paired pediatric blood and colon expression
publication_title: Concordance between gene expression in peripheral whole blood and colonic tissue in children with inflammatory bowel disease
verification_notes: Verified GEO record and publication; 98 children and 176 samples; raw CEL archive and processed data available.

study_name: GSE36807; IBD predictor classifiers by expression profiling
publication_title: Identification of novel predictor classifiers for inflammatory bowel disease by gene expression profiling
verification_notes: Verified GEO record, publication, sample count, platform, and public raw/processed availability. Age group not directly supported.

study_name: GSE6731; Crohn and ulcerative colitis endoscopic biopsy transcriptome
publication_title: Genome-wide gene expression differences in Crohn's disease and ulcerative colitis from endoscopic pinch biopsies: insights into distinctive pathogenesis
verification_notes: Verified GEO record and publication. Raw archive is public; processed availability is less clearly stated, so processed_data_available remains Unclear.

study_name: GSE1710; IBD transcriptome by cDNA microarray
publication_title: Dissection of the inflammatory bowel disease transcriptome using genome-wide cDNA microarrays
verification_notes: Verified GEO record and publication. GEO indicates 31 individuals/samples and no supplementary raw files; processed data are public.

study_name: GSE59071; AIM2 and IFI16 inflammasomes in active IBD mucosa
publication_title: Strong Upregulation of AIM2 and IFI16 Inflammasomes in the Mucosa of Patients with Active Inflammatory Bowel Disease

study_name: GSE11499; peripheral blood IBD transcriptomics
publication_title: Unclear
verification_notes: Verified GEO source record and public data availability. GEO citation is missing and no direct linked PubMed record was confirmed.

study_name: GSE94648; blood biomarkers of mucosal healing and endoscopic response
publication_title: Usefulness of Transcriptional Blood Biomarkers as a Non-invasive Surrogate Marker of Mucosal Healing and Endoscopic Response in Ulcerative Colitis
verification_notes: Verified GEO and PubMed. GEO design reports controls, inactive/active UC, and inactive/active CD; subjects left unclear because duplicate batch samples are present.

study_name: GSE75214; intestinal epithelial barrier dysfunction in IBD
publication_title: Genetic and Transcriptomic Bases of Intestinal Epithelial Barrier Dysfunction in Inflammatory Bowel Disease
verification_notes: Verified GEO and PubMed. Revised tissue site from colon-only to colon plus terminal/neo-ileum based on GEO record.

study_name: GSE48958; UC inflamed colon miRNA and mRNA profiling
publication_title: Integrated miRNA and mRNA expression profiling in inflamed colon of patients with ulcerative colitis
verification_notes: Verified GEO and PubMed. GEO design reports 13 UC patients and 8 normal controls.

study_name: GSE179285; gut-homing integrins in IBD intestinal lymphocytes
publication_title: Regulation and Role of alphaE Integrin and Gut Homing Integrins in Migration and Retention of Intestinal Lymphocytes during Inflammatory Bowel Disease
verification_notes: Verified GEO and PubMed. Revised disease scope from UC-only to CD, UC, and non-IBD controls based on source record.

study_name: GSE214695; IBD single-cell macrophage and neutrophil heterogeneity
publication_title: Macrophage and neutrophil heterogeneity at single-cell spatial resolution in human inflammatory bowel disease
verification_notes: Verified GEO and PubMed. GEO design reports 6 healthy, 6 UC, and 6 CD samples with raw and annotation files.

study_name: GSE234713; IBD CosMx spatial transcriptomics
publication_title: Macrophage and neutrophil heterogeneity at single-cell spatial resolution in human inflammatory bowel disease
verification_notes: Verified GEO and PubMed. GEO design reports 3 healthy, 3 CD, and 3 UC FFPE samples with normalized matrix and raw data.

study_name: GSE282122; longitudinal anti-TNF single-cell atlas in IBD
publication_title: A longitudinal single-cell atlas of anti-tumour necrosis factor treatment in inflammatory bowel disease
verification_notes: Verified GEO and PubMed. PubMed/GEO report 41 subjects and 216 gut biopsies; processed h5 archives are public, raw FASTQ availability was not directly confirmed.

study_name: HCA; treatment-naive and treated Crohn ileal mucosa

study_name: CELLxGENE IBD collections; portal-level registry row
publication_title: Unclear
verification_notes: Verified that CELLxGENE hosts relevant public IBD collections, but the row is a portal-level grouping. It should be split into specific collection-backed rows before being treated as a verified dataset.

study_name: PXD010371; fecal metaproteomics for CD and UC diagnosis
publication_title: Metaproteomics of fecal samples of Crohn's disease and Ulcerative Colitis
verification_notes: Verified ProteomeXchange and publication. ProteomeXchange reports 17 HC, 11 CD, 14 UC, 13 IBS, 8 colon adenoma, and 8 gastric carcinoma samples.

study_name: PXD001608; UC colon biopsy LC-MS/MS proteomics
publication_title: Neutrophil Extracellular Traps in Ulcerative Colitis: A Proteome Analysis of Intestinal Biopsies
sample_size_samples: 20 biopsies; 60 raw LC-MS/MS runs indicated by triplicates

study_name: MSV000086509; IBD200 multi-omics of IBD severity
publication_title: Location-specific signatures of Crohn's disease at a multi-omics scale
sample_size_samples: 210 fecal samples initially; 182 core analysis subjects

study_name: ST002470; PROTECT pediatric UC plasma metabolomics
publication_title: Linking microbial genes to plasma and stool metabolites uncovers host-microbial interactions underlying ulcerative colitis disease course
verification_notes: Verified Metabolomics Workbench record, publication, DOI, PMID, plasma source, and 89 samples. Subject count not directly supported.

study_name: GSE87648; IBD blood methylation EWAS
publication_title: Integrative epigenome-wide analysis demonstrates that DNA methylation may mediate genetic risk in inflammatory bowel disease
verification_notes: Verified GEO and PubMed. GEO summary reports 240 newly diagnosed IBD cases and 190 controls, but the series lists 384 raw samples and 382 processed samples.

study_name: GSE32148; IBD peripheral blood leukocyte methylation
publication_title: Genome-wide peripheral blood leukocyte DNA methylation microarrays identified a single association with inflammatory bowel diseases
verification_notes: Verified GEO and PubMed. GEO reports 17 CD, 11 UC, and 20 normal individuals, including discordant twin sets.

study_name: GSE32146; pediatric UC colon methylation discovery cohort
publication_title: DNA methylation-associated colonic mucosal immune and defense responses in treatment-naive pediatric ulcerative colitis
verification_notes: Verified GEO and PubMed. GEO states 10 CD, 4 UC, and 10 normal individuals, with one UC sample assayed before and after treatment.

study_name: GSE42921; pediatric UC colon methylation validation cohort
publication_title: DNA methylation-associated colonic mucosal immune and defense responses in treatment-naive pediatric ulcerative colitis
verification_notes: Verified GEO and PubMed. Validation cohort with 5 CD, 5 UC, and 12 normal individuals; one UC sample assayed before and after treatment.

study_name: GSE210721; DNMT3A intestinal epithelial barrier methylation resource
publication_title: DNA methyltransferase 3A controls intestinal epithelial barrier function and regeneration in the colon
verification_notes: Verified GEO and PubMed. Revised scope: this is an IBD-relevant epithelial/mechanistic resource using Caco-2 and mouse IEC/crypt methylation data, not a direct human IBD patient cohort.

study_name: International IBD Genetics Consortium (IIBDGC)
